languages.text: {n}Массивная нечеловеческая фигура, целиком скованная из темного металла, возвышается в центре ваших покоев. Кажется, несмотря на ваше прибытие, все внимание незваного гостя поглощено трофеями на стенах вашего кабинета.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Массивная нечеловеческая фигура, целиком скованная из темного металла, возвышается в центре ваших покоев. Кажется, несмотря на ваше прибытие, все внимание незваного гостя поглощено трофеями на стенах вашего кабинета.{/n}

languages.text: {n}A massive, inhuman figure, forged entirely from dark metal, stands towering in the middle of your chambers. Despite your arrival, the uninvited guest's attention seems to have been entirely captured by the trophies on the walls of your study.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Массивная нечеловеческая фигура, целиком скованная из темного металла, возвышается в центре ваших покоев. Кажется, несмотря на ваше прибытие, все внимание незваного гостя поглощено трофеями на стенах вашего кабинета.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}A massive, inhuman figure, forged entirely from dark metal, stands towering in the middle of your chambers. Despite your arrival, the uninvited guest's attention seems to have been entirely captured by the trophies on the walls of your study.{/n}

{n}A massive, inhuman figure, forged entirely from dark metal, stands towering in the middle of your chambers. Despite your arrival, the uninvited guest's attention seems to have been entirely captured by the trophies on the walls of your study.{/n}

languages.text: {n}一个通体由黑色金属铸成、庞大而非人的身影，矗立在你的房间中央。即便你已走进房间，这位不速之客依旧沉浸于你书房墙上的那些战利品。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A massive, inhuman figure, forged entirely from dark metal, stands towering in the middle of your chambers. Despite your arrival, the uninvited guest's attention seems to have been entirely captured by the trophies on the walls of your study.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}一个通体由黑色金属铸成、庞大而非人的身影，矗立在你的房间中央。即便你已走进房间，这位不速之客依旧沉浸于你书房墙上的那些战利品。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Una figura gigantesca e inhumana, forjada únicamente de metal oscuro, se yergue en su enormidad en mitad de tus aposentos. A pesar de tu llegada, la atención del intruso parece estar centrada exclusivamente en los trofeos que cubren las paredes de tu estudio.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A massive, inhuman figure, forged entirely from dark metal, stands towering in the middle of your chambers. Despite your arrival, the uninvited guest's attention seems to have been entirely captured by the trophies on the walls of your study.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Una figura gigantesca e inhumana, forjada únicamente de metal oscuro, se yergue en su enormidad en mitad de tus aposentos. A pesar de tu llegada, la atención del intruso parece estar centrada exclusivamente en los trofeos que cubren las paredes de tu estudio.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Une silhouette massive, inhumaine, forgée intégralement dans un métal sombre, se tient au beau milieu de vos quartiers. Votre arrivée n'ébranle pas le moins du monde l'intrus, qui semble captivé par les trophées décorant les murs de votre bureau.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A massive, inhuman figure, forged entirely from dark metal, stands towering in the middle of your chambers. Despite your arrival, the uninvited guest's attention seems to have been entirely captured by the trophies on the walls of your study.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Une silhouette massive, inhumaine, forgée intégralement dans un métal sombre, se tient au beau milieu de vos quartiers. Votre arrivée n'ébranle pas le moins du monde l'intrus, qui semble captivé par les trophées décorant les murs de votre bureau.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Tamamen koyu metalden dövülmüş devasa, insanlık dışı bir figür; odanın ortasında yükseliyor. Davetsiz misafirin, senin gelişine rağmen dikkatini tamamen çalışma odanın duvarlarındaki ganimetlere odaklamış gibi görünüyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A massive, inhuman figure, forged entirely from dark metal, stands towering in the middle of your chambers. Despite your arrival, the uninvited guest's attention seems to have been entirely captured by the trophies on the walls of your study.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Tamamen koyu metalden dövülmüş devasa, insanlık dışı bir figür; odanın ortasında yükseliyor. Davetsiz misafirin, senin gelişine rağmen dikkatini tamamen çalışma odanın duvarlarındaki ganimetlere odaklamış gibi görünüyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Eine massive unmenschliche Gestalt aus dunklem Metall ragt in der Mitte deiner Gemächer vor dir auf. Trotz deines Kommens scheint die Aufmerksamkeit des ungebetenen Gastes allein den Trophäen an den Wänden deines Arbeitszimmers zu gelten.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A massive, inhuman figure, forged entirely from dark metal, stands towering in the middle of your chambers. Despite your arrival, the uninvited guest's attention seems to have been entirely captured by the trophies on the walls of your study.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Eine massive unmenschliche Gestalt aus dunklem Metall ragt in der Mitte deiner Gemächer vor dir auf. Trotz deines Kommens scheint die Aufmerksamkeit des ungebetenen Gastes allein den Trophäen an den Wänden deines Arbeitszimmers zu gelten.{/n}

languages.text: {n}黒い金属で全身を鋳造された、巨大で人ならざる人影が、あなたの私室の中央にそびえ立っている。あなたが現れたにもかかわらず、招かれざる客の関心は、書斎の壁を飾るトロフィーにすっかり奪われているようだ。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A massive, inhuman figure, forged entirely from dark metal, stands towering in the middle of your chambers. Despite your arrival, the uninvited guest's attention seems to have been entirely captured by the trophies on the walls of your study.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}黒い金属で全身を鋳造された、巨大で人ならざる人影が、あなたの私室の中央にそびえ立っている。あなたが現れたにもかかわらず、招かれざる客の関心は、書斎の壁を飾るトロフィーにすっかり奪われているようだ。{/n}
